articles.title: Stellar Blade Dev Praises Sony's Support
articles.description: Shift Up's Hyung-Tae Kim discusses new hero design and Sony's publishing support for Stellar Blade: Blood Rains. Exciting insights into game development emerge.
articles.impact: Sony's backing enhances game development potential.

articles.title: First Look at Galaxy S26 FE
articles.description: The Galaxy S26 FE is unveiled, showcasing its design and features. Early impressions suggest a competitive entry in the smartphone market.
articles.impact: Galaxy S26 FE aims to capture market attention.

articles.title: NASA's High-Tech Prada Long Johns for Moon
articles.description: NASA astronauts will wear Prada-designed cooling long johns during lunar missions. This innovative base layer enhances comfort in spacesuits.

articles.title: Xbox's Future Exclusive Games Plans
articles.description: Matt Booty discusses Xbox's strategy for exclusive games post-showcase. The focus remains on delivering compelling content for gamers.
articles.impact: Xbox aims to strengthen exclusive game lineup.

articles.title: Beast of Reincarnation Gameplay Revealed
articles.description: New details for Beast of Reincarnation include gameplay insights and voice cast announcements. Protagonist Emma will be voiced by Yui Ishikawa.
articles.impact: Excitement builds for Beast of Reincarnation.

articles.title: Thief: The Dark Project Remastered Announced
articles.description: Thief: The Dark Project Remastered is set to revive the classic game for modern consoles. Fans can expect a nostalgic yet fresh experience.
articles.impact: Thief's remaster aims to attract new players.

articles.title: Persona 4 Revival Live Stream Announced
articles.description: Atlus announces a live stream for Persona 4 Revival on June 18, 2026. Fans can expect exciting updates and insights from the producer.
articles.impact: Fans eagerly await new Persona 4 details.

articles.title: Apple Watch Series 11 vs Competitors
articles.description: The Apple Watch Series 11 excels in a recent health tracker comparison. It outperforms Oura, Fitbit, and Whoop in key areas.
articles.impact: Apple Watch Series 11 leads in health tracking.

articles.title: Final Fantasy 7 Revelation Details Unveiled
articles.description: New details about Final Fantasy 7 Revelation emerge, concluding the trilogy next year. Fans are excited for the final installment.
articles.impact: Final Fantasy 7 trilogy reaches its climax.

articles.title: Foldable iPhone Design Revealed
articles.description: Detailed images of a foldable iPhone dummy unit showcase its design. The device may only be available in white.
articles.impact: Foldable iPhone design sparks consumer interest.

articles.title: Godzilla: Destroy All Monsters Melee Remastered
articles.description: Godzilla: Destroy All Monsters Melee Remastered is set for release this November on multiple platforms. The classic kaiju brawler returns with updated features.
articles.impact: Godzilla's remaster aims to revive nostalgia.
